info.title: XrmSync
info.description: A command-line tool for synchronizing Dataverse plugins and custom APIs with your local plugin assemblies.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: XrmSync - Synchronize your Dataverse plugins and webresources

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Perform a dry run without making changes to Dataverse [default: False]

options.name: --ci-mode
options.description: Enable CI mode which prefixes all warnings and errors for easier parsing in CI systems [default: False]

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the minimum log level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) (Default: Information)

options.name: --profile
options.description: Name of the profile to load from appsettings.json (automatically uses single profile if only one exists)

commands.name: plugins
commands.description: Synchronize plugins in a plugin assembly with Dataverse

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to the plugin assembly (*.dll)

options.name: --profile
options.description: Name of the profile to load from appsettings.json (automatically uses single profile if only one exists)

options.name: --solution
options.description: Name of the solution

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Perform a dry run without making changes to Dataverse

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the minimum log level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) (Default: Information)

options.name: --ci-mode
options.description: Enable CI mode which prefixes all warnings and errors for easier parsing in CI systems

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze a plugin assembly and output info as JSON

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to the plugin assembly (*.dll)

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Publisher prefix for unique names (Default: new)

options.name: --pretty-print
options.description: Pretty print the JSON output [default: False]

options.name: --profile
options.description: Name of the profile to load from appsettings.json (automatically uses single profile if only one exists)

commands.name: webresources
commands.description: Synchronize webresources from a local folder with Dataverse

options.name: --folder
options.description: Path to the root folder containing the webresources to sync

options.name: --file-extensions
options.description: File extensions to include in the sync (e.g. js css). When omitted, all supported types are synced.

options.name: --profile
options.description: Name of the profile to load from appsettings.json (automatically uses single profile if only one exists)

options.name: --solution
options.description: Name of the solution

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Perform a dry run without making changes to Dataverse

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the minimum log level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) (Default: Information)

options.name: --ci-mode
options.description: Enable CI mode which prefixes all warnings and errors for easier parsing in CI systems

options.name: --profile
options.description: Name of the profile to load from appsettings.json (automatically uses single profile if only one exists)
